triage_rows.detail: This family has already collapsed into a singular residue.
The remaining misses are more consistent with missing rebuild timing than with same-day sell timing.

interpretation: V1.34AV converts the post-exit rebound pattern audit into the next orthogonal direction judgment.
If most remaining rebound-cost cases are negative on day 1 but positive later, the next family should be a rebuild or re-entry supervision family rather than another sell-side timing family.
